## 📋 Pull Request Description

### Summary

Briefly describe what this PR accomplishes:

### Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/formatting changes
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvements
- [ ] 🧪 Test additions or improvements
- [ ] 🔧 Build/CI changes
- [ ] 🗃️ Database changes

### Related Issues

- Fixes #[issue_number]
- Related to #[issue_number]
- Part of #[issue_number]

## 🧪 Testing

### Test Coverage

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Integration tests added/updated
- [ ] E2E tests added/updated
- [ ] Manual testing completed

### Testing Checklist

**Manual Testing:**
- [ ] Tested on desktop browsers (Chrome, Firefox, Safari)
- [ ] Tested on mobile devices (iOS, Android)
- [ ] Tested with different user roles/permissions
- [ ] Tested error scenarios and edge cases
- [ ] Tested performance impact

**Automated Testing:**
- [ ] All existing tests pass
- [ ] New tests written for new functionality
- [ ] Test coverage maintained above 80%
- [ ] No test warnings or deprecations

### Test Results

```bash
# Paste test results here
npm test
```

## 🔒 Security Considerations

### Security Review

- [ ] Input validation added/verified
- [ ] Authentication/authorization checked
- [ ] SQL injection prevention verified
- [ ] XSS prevention measures in place
- [ ] CSRF protection maintained
- [ ] Security headers properly configured

### Security Checklist

- [ ] No sensitive data exposed in logs
- [ ] Proper error handling (no information leakage)
- [ ] Dependencies scanned for vulnerabilities
- [ ] API endpoints properly secured

## 🌍 Accessibility

### Accessibility Testing

- [ ] Keyboard navigation tested
- [ ] Screen reader compatibility verified
- [ ] Color contrast meets WCAG standards
- [ ] Alt text provided for images
- [ ] Focus indicators visible
- [ ] Semantic HTML used

### ARIA Labels

- [ ] ARIA labels added where necessary
- [ ] Role attributes properly used
- [ ] Live regions implemented for dynamic content

## 🌐 Internationalization

### i18n Considerations

- [ ] New text strings added to translation files
- [ ] RTL (right-to-left) layout considered
- [ ] Date/time formatting localized
- [ ] Number formatting localized

## 📱 Mobile Responsiveness

### Mobile Testing

- [ ] Responsive design verified
- [ ] Touch interactions tested
- [ ] Performance on mobile devices tested
- [ ] Offline functionality (if applicable) tested

## 🔄 Deployment

### Deployment Checklist

- [ ] Environment variables documented
- [ ] Configuration changes documented
- [ ] Feature flags configured (if applicable)
- [ ] Monitoring/alerting updated

### Rollback Plan

- [ ] Rollback procedure documented
- [ ] Database rollback plan ready
- [ ] Feature flags can disable new functionality

## 👀 Review Checklist

### For Reviewers

Please verify:

- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] Changes are well-documented
- [ ] Tests provide adequate coverage
- [ ] Performance impact is acceptable
- [ ] Security considerations addressed
- [ ] Accessibility requirements met
- [ ] Documentation is updated

### Review Areas

**Focus Areas for Review:**
- [ ] Business logic correctness
- [ ] Error handling robustness
- [ ] Performance implications
- [ ] Security vulnerabilities
- [ ] Code maintainability
- [ ] Test quality and coverage
